context: ◊  Pyogenic abscess rarely calcifies! ◊  50% of echinococcal cysts calcify √  large obstructive calculus in > 70% √  thin peripheral "eggshell"-like calcification DDx:  residual pantopaque used in cyst puncture √  circular cracked eggshell appearance
